title: Remediate Plexus Snyk findings
description: Track and remediate all security vulnerabilities found by Snyk in the Plexus repository. 141 unique issues across Python deps, JS/Node deps, and OS/container base images.
creator: derek

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Closing in Kanbus repo: Plexus remediation tracking should live in Plexus, not here.
